examples.title: Auto-fill cards
examples.description: Grid can create intrinsic responsive columns from a minimum item width.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { Card } from '@lostgradient/cinder/card';
  import { Grid } from '@lostgradient/cinder/grid';
</script>

<Grid minItemWidth="14rem" gap="var(--cinder-space-4)">
  <Card>Analytics</Card>
  <Card>Integrations</Card>
  <Card>Billing</Card>
  <Card>Audit log</Card>
</Grid>

examples.title: Explicit placement
examples.description: A 12-column grid using Grid.Item for spans while plain children use auto-placement.
